cross_scene_arcs.title: Mission to Stop Dr. Evil
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Austin learns Dr. Evil has escaped and is setting a trap, confronts him but fails to capture him as he escapes frozen, is later revived in 1997 to continue the mission, and ultimately aborts Dr. Evil's detonation plan.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Dr. Evil has escaped prison and set a trap; Austin is dispatched to confront him.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Detonation aborted, but Dr. Evil remains at large from his earlier escape.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Dr. Evil is frozen and at large, implying a future threat.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Partnership and Romance with Vanessa
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Austin is partnered with Vanessa, experiences social mishaps, uncovers a lead to Alotta Fagina, is seduced and drugs, admits infidelity causing a rift, they are captured and escape together, and finally declare love with Vanessa promoted.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Assigned to work with Vanessa Kensington to stop Dr. Evil.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In a romantic relationship with Vanessa, who is promoted to Field Agent.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Austin's fidelity is questioned, and Basil's mission warning is ignored.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Hundred Billion Dollar Ransom
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dr. Evil finalizes a $100 billion ransom demand, secures a warhead, presents the ultimatum to the UN, and initiates the final countdown for his threat.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ransom plan adjusted to $100 billion after financial assessment.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Penetration countdown active with five minutes to launch.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the UN will pay or the world will be destroyed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Father-Son Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dr. Evil learns he has a son, Scott, who rejects him; in therapy, he admits to wanting to kill Scott for not inheriting the business; during an escape, he abandons Scott and orders his death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Discovery of paternity met with rejection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emotional abandonment and death order for Scott.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Scott's fate and the unresolved familial rift.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Trap for Austin Powers
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dr. Evil plots to trap Austin in London, aims to neutralize him, unveils the Vulcan drill, sets a piranha death trap, and escapes after a confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Plan initiated to lure and eliminate Austin Powers.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Escape in rocket with Austin still pursuing.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Austin's survival and future attempts to stop Dr. Evil.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escape to Fight Another Day
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dr. Evil employs cryogenic freezing to escape to the future and later uses a rocket to flee after triggering a self-destruct sequence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Escapes capture via cryogenic egg chair.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Escapes in rocket, leaving a destructing lair.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His location and plans after each escape.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Career Advancement to Field Agent
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vanessa begins as a top agent assigned to acclimate Austin, reveals her goal to earn field operative promotion through this mission, and ultimately achieves that promotion by the mission's end.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Top agent handling desk duty and Austin's reintegration

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Relationship with Austin
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vanessa initially rejects Austin's advances, then gradually accepts romantic attention during a dinner date, demands fidelity after his infidelity, briefly reasserts professional boundaries, and finally declares love for him.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In a declared romantic relationship with Austin

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mission Competence Under Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vanessa demonstrates professionalism by locating the Dr. Evil dossier, resourcefully escapes a death trap using dental floss, and confronts Alotta in a hostage situation, transitioning from captive to aggressor.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Proven field operative who neutralized a direct threat

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Alotta Fagina
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After learning of Austin's infidelity with Alotta, Vanessa directly confronts Alotta during a hostage situation, disarming and subduing her with a judo chop.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Personal conflict with Alotta physically resolved
